Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay
Off Calendar Sep-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
John A. Brockmeier (310-425-3431; john.brockmeier@brockmeierlaw.com) for Plaintiff.
Douglas Grady of Baker & Hostetler LLP for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GARRETT MADISON's Motion To Dismiss Or Stay on the basis of forum non conveniens is granted. (see word minute for details.)

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT GARRETT MADISON MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE:

The verified application of Douglas A. Grady to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendant Garrett Madison is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
